tasks.title: Implement SecretsProvider Vault integration
tasks.description: Implement SecretsProvider with get_mailbox_credentials(), get_database_credentials(), rotate_credentials(), and is_credentials_expiring_soon() using Vault client abstraction.
tests: tests/unit/test_secrets_provider.py: credential rotation and ttl checks
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_secrets_provider.py -q` passes and Vault credential retrieval paths are covered.

tasks.title: Implement MailboxConnector Graph integration
tasks.description: Implement MailboxConnector connect(), disconnect(), retrieve_emails(start_date, end_date), and is_connected() with mailbox-scoped Microsoft Graph access.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_mailbox_connector.py -q` passes with Graph SDK mocked and mailbox scope enforced.

tasks.title: Implement EmailNewIdentifier dedup tracking
tasks.description: Implement identify_new_emails(), mark_email_processed(email_id), and is_email_already_processed() for processed-email filtering.
tests: tests/unit/test_email_new_identifier.py: identify new vs processed ids
tests/unit/test_email_new_identifier.py: mark and lookup processed emails
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_email_new_identifier.py -q` passes including duplicate email filtering cases.

tasks.title: Implement AuditLogger foundation CRUD
tasks.description: Create AuditLogger with create_run_record(), record_email_processed(), finalize_run_record(), query_run_records(), and query_email_records().
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_audit_logger.py -q` passes and queryable audit fields are asserted.

tasks.title: Implement PrescriptionRepository upsert and dedup
tasks.description: Implement store_or_update(), find_by_composite_key(), get_all_prescriptions(), and bulk_upsert() with composite-key dedup semantics.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_prescription_repository.py -q` passes and duplicate reprocessing keeps one record per composite key.

tasks.title: Implement JobStateManager state lifecycle
tasks.description: Implement initialize_run_state(), get_resumption_point(), mark_email_as_processed(), and finalize_run_state() backed by persistent state.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_job_state_manager.py -q` passes and restart checkpoints are persisted per email.

tasks.title: Implement PDFExtractionEngine core extraction
tasks.description: Implement extract_fields(), validate_pdf_format(), and detect_format_change() for 23-field extraction with anomaly hooks.
tests: tests/unit/test_pdf_extraction_engine.py: extract 23 fields from canonical PDFs
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_pdf_extraction_engine.py -q` passes including malformed PDF detection cases.

tasks.title: Implement DataValidator field and key validation
tasks.description: Implement validate_prescription_fields(), is_field_present(), and validate_composite_key() for completeness checks before persistence.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_data_validator.py -q` passes and all required field checks are asserted.

tasks.title: Create PostgreSQL schema for prescriptions and audits
tasks.description: Create prescriptions, run_audit, email_audit, and processed_emails tables with required indexes and composite unique constraints.
tests: tests/integration/test_schema.py: unique and fk constraints enforced
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_schema.py -q` passes and composite key constraint prevents duplicate inserts.

tasks.title: Implement IntakeOrchestrator foundation flows
tasks.description: Implement run_historical_load(), run_daily_intake(), and execute_intake_job() coordinating mailbox retrieval, extraction, validation, persistence, and audit logging.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_intake_orchestrator.py -q` passes with mocked Graph and test Postgres.

tasks.title: Implement APSchedulerJobRunner scheduling
tasks.description: Implement start_scheduler(), stop_scheduler(), schedule_daily_run(), and get_scheduled_jobs() with persistent scheduler config.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_apscheduler_job_runner.py -q` passes with scheduler lifecycle assertions.

tasks.title: Create application entrypoint and graceful shutdown
tasks.description: Wire configuration, scheduler startup, signal handlers, and graceful shutdown behavior for unattended runtime.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/e2e/test_main_startup.py -q` passes and process exits cleanly on signal.

tasks.title: Add monitoring dashboard routes and retry endpoint
tasks.description: Implement GET /runs, GET /runs/{id}, and POST /runs/{id}/retry for operations monitoring and targeted retry actions.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_dashboard_routes.py -q` passes for list/detail/retry route contracts.

tasks.title: Implement failure alert dispatcher
tasks.description: Implement PARTIAL/FAILED alert dispatch with transient/permanent failure classification and operator-ready message templates.
tests: tests/unit/test_alert_dispatcher.py: PARTIAL and FAILED alert triggering
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_alert_dispatcher.py -q` passes and alert payload fields match run metrics schema.

tasks.title: Add historical load controls to orchestrator
tasks.description: Extend run_historical_load(start_date) to estimate candidate email count, initialize historical mode state, and write start markers to audit.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_historical_load.py -q` passes for one-time load setup and auditing.

tasks.title: Implement real-time progress API
tasks.description: Create GET /run/{id}/progress endpoint returning processed, total, elapsed, and ETA based on orchestrator and audit state.
tests: tests/integration/test_progress_api.py: progress shape and monotonic updates
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_progress_api.py -q` passes and endpoint reflects in-flight historical runs.

tasks.title: Implement restart-safe resume behavior
tasks.description: Add interruption handling that records checkpoint state and resumes from first unprocessed email without duplicate writes.
tests: tests/integration/test_restart_safety.py: interrupt at midpoint and resume
tests/integration/test_restart_safety.py: final dataset has zero duplicates
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_restart_safety.py -q` passes with interruption/resume and zero-duplicate assertions.

tasks.title: Implement audit query and drill-down routes
tasks.description: Implement GET /audit/runs filters, GET /audit/runs/{id}/emails drill-down, and GET /audit/emails/{id} detail payload.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_audit_routes.py -q` passes for query and drill-down endpoints.

tasks.title: Implement CSV export service for audit records
tasks.description: Implement CSV export for audit query result sets and background queue path for large exports.
tests: tests/integration/test_csv_export.py: csv column order and formatting
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_csv_export.py -q` passes and exported file format matches compliance template.

tasks.title: Harden PDF format anomaly handling
tasks.description: Enforce explicit failure on schema mismatch before extraction and emit structured anomaly details to audit logger hooks.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_format_detection.py -q` passes with malformed PDFs all classified as explicit failures.

tasks.title: Implement captured records query routes
tasks.description: Implement GET /records and GET /records/{id} with date/prescriber filters and 23-field detail plus source traceability metadata.
tests: tests/integration/test_records_routes.py: record detail includes source linkage
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_records_routes.py -q` passes and detail payload includes all 23 fields with source references.

tasks.title: Implement verification audit trail service
tasks.description: Implement verification comment capture with operator_id, timestamp, verification status, and retrieval hooks for compliance audit.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_verification_service.py -q` passes and verification records are retrievable by audit filters.

tasks.title: Create runtime configuration module
tasks.description: Implement env-driven config loader for VAULT_ADDR, DB_CONNECTION, GRAPH_TENANT_ID, DAILY_RUN_TIME, and feature flags with validation.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_config.py -q` passes and invalid environment raises actionable errors.

tasks.title: Create structured logging setup
tasks.description: Configure structlog JSON logging with run_id, date, status, email_id, and record_count dimensions for operations and audit queries.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/unit/test_logging_setup.py -q` passes and logs include query dimensions used by audit endpoints.

tasks.title: Create dependency manifest
tasks.description: Pin runtime and test dependencies including python-dotenv, azure-identity, microsoft-graph-core, pdfplumber, sqlalchemy, psycopg2-binary, apscheduler, hvac, structlog, and flask.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_dependencies.py -q` passes and required imports succeed in CI image.

tasks.title: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow
tasks.description: Define CI job for unit, integration, and e2e test execution with coverage and static checks for merge gating.
tasks.definition_of_done: `python -m yaml .github/workflows/ci.yml` succeeds and CI runs `pytest` suites without workflow errors.

tasks.title: Create pytest fixtures and shared mocks
tasks.description: Provide fixtures for mocked Vault, Graph SDK, ephemeral test DB, mock email sender, and sample PDF corpus.
tests: tests/conftest.py: fixture bootstrap smoke via pytest collection
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest --collect-only -q` succeeds and fixture-dependent unit tests execute without setup failures.

tasks.title: Create integration test helper toolkit
tasks.description: Implement DB setup/teardown, Graph response simulation, mail payload builders, and run interruption simulation helpers.
tasks.definition_of_done: `pytest tests/integration/test_restart_safety.py -q` runs using helpers and reproduces interruption/resume deterministically.

vertical_slices.name: Foundation Intake Pipeline
vertical_slices.demo: Run scheduled intake and show run metrics + persisted audit records with extraction and dedup in place.

vertical_slices.name: Operations Monitoring and Recovery
vertical_slices.demo: Show failed-run alerting, failure details, and one-click transient retry with resume-safe behavior.

vertical_slices.name: Historical Load Progress
vertical_slices.demo: Trigger historical load from a start date and observe real-time progress with ETA.

vertical_slices.name: Compliance Audit Query and Export
vertical_slices.demo: Filter runs, drill to email-level detail, and export filtered audit records to CSV.

vertical_slices.name: Data Accuracy Verification
vertical_slices.demo: Detect malformed PDF formats, inspect captured records with source traceability, and record verification sign-off comments.
